# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for application data

Resources:
  ApplicationSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Enable SSH access
      VpcId: vpc-xxxxxxxx
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  ApplicationEC2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      InstanceType: t2.micro
      ImageId: ami-xxxxxxxx
      KeyName: your-key-pair
      SecurityGroupIds:
        - !Ref ApplicationSecurityGroup
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
          Ebs:
            VolumeSize: 30
            DeleteOnTermination: true
            VolumeType: gp2

Outputs:
  InstanceId:
    Description: EC2 Instance Id
    Value: !Ref ApplicationEC2Instance
  PublicIP:
    Description: Public IP of the EC2 Instance
    Value: !GetAtt ApplicationEC2Instance.PublicIp
